title: Race for French presidency sees ex-PM Philippe as early favourite to beat populists
summary_full: Latest polls suggest the centre-right figure is the only candidate who can defeat Marine Le Pen or Jean-Luc Mélenchon.
summary_public: Latest polls suggest the centre-right figure is the only candidate who can defeat Marine Le Pen or Jean-Luc Mélenchon.

FR.label: positive
FR.evidence: favourite to beat populists Marine Le Pen or Jean-Luc Mélenchon
